title: Annual Science Exhibition 2024: Students Showcase Innovations
excerpt: Over 150 students from Classes VI–XII presented groundbreaking projects at the annual science fair, drawing praise from industry experts and parents alike.
body:
Sajj Global School's Annual Science Exhibition 2024 was a spectacular display of young scientific minds at their best. Held over two days in the school's main auditorium, the event saw participation from more than 150 students across Classes VI to XII.

Highlights included a solar-powered irrigation model by Class X students, an AI-based plant disease detection system by Class XII, and a working model of a hydrogen fuel cell by Class IX. Expert judges from local engineering colleges and technology firms lauded the depth of research and practical application demonstrated by the participants.

Principal Ms. Nadia Hussain addressed the gathering: "Science isn't just a subject here — it's a way of thinking, a way of questioning. These students have made us incredibly proud."

The top three projects will represent the school at the State Science Olympiad in September.
author: SGS Communications

title: Excellent Board Results: 100% Pass Rate, 14 Students Score Above 95%
excerpt: Sajj Global School celebrates outstanding performance in the 2023–24 board examinations, with 14 students scoring above 95% and the school's first state topper.
body:
We are thrilled to announce that Sajj Global School has once again achieved exceptional results in the Board Examinations for Classes X and XII. All appearing students have passed, maintaining the school's unbroken record of 100% pass rate for the seventh consecutive year.

Of particular note, 14 students secured above 95% aggregate marks, and Priya Sharma of Class XII (Science) has emerged as a State Topper in Mathematics with a perfect score of 100/100.

The results reflect the relentless dedication of our faculty and the hard work of our students. The school administration congratulates every student and thanks parents for their continued support.
author: SGS Communications

title: SGS Dominates Inter-School Sports Meet, Wins Overall Championship
excerpt: Our students brought home 18 gold medals and the overall championship trophy at the District Inter-School Sports Meet held at the Regional Sports Complex.
body:
Sajj Global School's sports contingent of 85 athletes delivered a sterling performance at the Annual District Inter-School Sports Meet, winning the Overall Championship for the second consecutive year. The team bagged 18 gold, 12 silver, and 7 bronze medals across athletics, swimming, badminton, and team sports.

Standout performances included Arjun Mehta's double gold in 100m and 200m sprint, and the girls' volleyball team's unbeaten run through the tournament. Coach Ravi Kumar credited the school's upgraded sports facilities and systematic year-round training programme.

"Sports teach children resilience and teamwork in ways the classroom can't replicate. We invest in both," said Chairman Mr. Salim Khan.
author: SGS Sports Desk

title: State-of-the-Art Computer Lab Inaugurated
excerpt: A fully equipped 60-seat computer lab with high-speed internet and latest hardware was inaugurated by the Foundation Chairman, enhancing digital learning for all students.
body:
Sajj Global Foundation has commissioned a brand-new, 60-seat computer laboratory at Sajj Global School. The facility features the latest generation workstations, a dedicated gigabit internet connection, and an interactive projection system for collaborative learning.

The lab will serve students from Class III onwards, supporting subjects including Computer Science, Data Science, and Digital Arts. It has been designed in consultation with STEM educators to meet the demands of modern curricula and competitive examinations.

Foundation Chairman Mr. Salim Khan inaugurated the facility and emphasized the Foundation's commitment to making world-class learning infrastructure accessible: "We believe no child's potential should be limited by the tools available to them."
author: SGS Communications

title: Cultural Harmony Day 2024: A Celebration of Diversity
excerpt: Students from Kindergarten to Class XII performed 40 cultural acts representing India's rich heritage at the school's annual Cultural Harmony Day.
body:
The school's Cultural Harmony Day was a vibrant, three-hour celebration of India's diversity. Students presented classical dance forms, folk music, regional plays, and art installations, with each class representing a different state or community.

The event was attended by over 600 parents and guests, and drew a standing ovation for the grand finale performance by Class XII, a choreographed medley of India's cultural traditions. Cultural Coordinator Ms. Fatima Siddiqui called it "the most ambitious production the school has ever staged."
author: SGS Communications

title: Admissions Open for Academic Year 2025–26
excerpt: Registration for the upcoming academic year is now open for Classes Nursery through XI. Apply online or visit the admission office.
body:
Sajj Global School is pleased to announce that admissions for the Academic Year 2025–26 are now open. We are accepting applications for all classes from Nursery to Class XI.

Admission to Classes I–IX is based on assessment and interaction. Class XI admissions are based on Class X board results and a counselling session.

Parents are encouraged to submit the online enquiry form or visit the Admission Office between 9 AM and 2 PM on weekdays. The last date for submission of applications is 31st January 2025. For more information, visit our Admissions page.
author: Admissions Office
